title: VL+ Instance
description: The best experience for playing the Ventureland server!
body:
## The VL+ instance is my try at the best experience to play the Ventureland server

The instance includes many things like:
- Performance enhancing mods like Sodium and Lithium
- QOL mods like Mouse Tweaks, Freelook, Freecam, a zoom mod and more
- Combat related things such as Optimal Aim, Damage tint, No Screen bobbing and a dynamic crosshair that is able to be viewed in 3rd person
- Looks of the game mods like Continuity, ETF, CIT Resewn, Resoucify to add and update packs automatically and respackopts to change certain things via resourcepacks on the fly

If you want the best experience playing on the ventureland server try this instance!

![The title screen of the instance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9783c3df1a8099fd387c35f845698b9eb2dbbe8.png)

## Check the versions tab for the exact mods added in the modpack
Note: There are changes between what mods are in the modpack between versions

## resourcepacks included:
### By me:
- [VL+ Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vl+)
- [CA Enchant glint](https://modrinth.com/project/26r22W5u)
- [VL+ Dark GUI](https://modrinth.com/project/2iu22Yy1)
- [VL+ Green GUI](https://modrinth.com/project/Az0hpydj)
### By others
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/project/50dA9Sha)
- [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/project/slufHzC2)
- [Bushy Leaves for Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/project/4TzEoKdR)
- [Compatibility Patch for Faithful32x & FreshAnimations](https://modrinth.com/project/EeMQI7nJ)
- [Original Ventureland Resourcepack](https://www.ventureland.net/resourcedownloads) (not included but a button with a link has been made available)
- [Faithfull pack 32x](https://faithfulpack.net/)
